---
title: "shift test"
author: "R. Cunning"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
library(lme4)
library(emmeans)
library(terra)
library(tidyverse)
```


## 1. Initial model: Bleaching ~ DHW across years
```{r bleaching_by_dhw_across_years}
# Import data to fit bleaching model
allg <- readr::read_rds("data/processed/all_grp_bl.rds")
peak_dates <- read_csv("data/processed/peak_dates.csv")

# Model differences in bleaching severity between years with DHW as continuous predictor
dhw.mod24 <- glmer(cbind(BL, NB) ~ dhw + year + year:Week2 + (dhw + year | Species) + (year | Subregion),  
                 family = "binomial", data = allg, 
                 verbose = FALSE, nAGQ = 0, control = glmerControl(optimizer = "nloptwrap"))
summary(dhw.mod24)


# Function to get ED50s and ∆ED50s
ed50s.fun_fast <- function(mod, peak_dates = NULL) {
  if (is.null(peak_dates)) {
    if (!exists("peak_dates", envir = .GlobalEnv, inherits = FALSE)) {
      stop("No peak_dates provided and no object named 'peak_dates' found in the global environment.")
    }
    peak_dates <- get("peak_dates", envir = .GlobalEnv)
  }
  
  combos <- peak_dates %>%
    mutate(year = as.integer(as.character(year))) %>%
    arrange(year)
  b <- fixef(mod)

  mf <- model.frame(mod)

  # ensure year/Week2 are factors with the model's levels (this will also catch fakes)
  combos$year  <- factor(as.character(combos$year),  levels = levels(mf$year))
  combos$Week2 <- factor(as.character(combos$Week2), levels = levels(mf$Week2))

  # explicit checks (friendlier error messages than "new levels" downstream)
  bad_year  <- setdiff(as.character(peak_dates$year),  levels(mf$year))
  bad_week2 <- setdiff(as.character(peak_dates$Week2), levels(mf$Week2))
  if (length(bad_year))  stop("peak_dates has year(s) not in model: ",  paste(bad_year, collapse = ", "))
  if (length(bad_week2)) stop("peak_dates has Week2 level(s) not in model: ", paste(bad_week2, collapse = ", "))

  # build a fixed-effect design matrix for dhw = 0 rows
  combos$dhw <- 0
  tt <- delete.response(terms(mod))
  X <- model.matrix(tt, combos)

  # handle rank-deficiency: columns in X that were dropped from fixef(mod)
  miss <- setdiff(colnames(X), names(b))
  if (length(miss)) {
    warning("Some fixed-effect columns are not in fixef(mod) (rank deficiency); treating as 0: ",
            paste(miss, collapse = ", "))
    b <- c(b, setNames(rep(0, length(miss)), miss))
  }

  eta0 <- drop(X %*% b[colnames(X)])

  # ED50 where eta = 0 on logit scale: dhw = -eta0 / beta_dhw
  if (!("dhw" %in% names(b)) || abs(unname(b["dhw"])) < 1e-12) {
    ed50 <- rep(NA_real_, length(eta0))
  } else {
    ed50 <- -eta0 / unname(b["dhw"])
  }

  ed50_names <- as.character(combos$year)
  delta <- ed50[-1] - ed50[1]
  delta_names <- paste0(as.character(combos$year[-1]), "-", as.character(combos$year[1]))

  res <- c(ed50, delta)
  setNames(res, c(ed50_names, delta_names))
}

# Get point estimates for ED50s and ∆ED50s
bleach50 <- ed50s.fun_fast(dhw.mod24)
bleach50

# Get bootstrap confidence intervals for ED50s and ∆ED50s across years
set.seed(1)
boot.outnull <- bootMer(dhw.mod24, FUN = ed50s.fun_fast, nsim = 120, re.form = NULL,
                        seed = 123, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = 6)
saveRDS(boot.outnull, file = "data/processed/boot.outnull.rds")
boot.outnull <- readRDS(file = "data/processed/boot.outnull.rds")
## Get confidence intervals from Bootstrap
lower <- apply(boot.outnull$t, 2, function(x) as.numeric(quantile(x, probs=.025, na.rm=TRUE)))
upper <- apply(boot.outnull$t, 2, function(x) as.numeric(quantile(x, probs=.975, na.rm=TRUE)))
se <- apply(boot.outnull$t, 2, sd)

ed50conf <- tibble(
  year = names(bleach50), 
  ed50 = bleach50,
  se = se,
  lower = lower,
  upper = upper)


# Get max and min DHW for conducted surveys as bounds
dhw_ranges <- allg %>% 
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(maxdhw = max(dhw, na.rm = TRUE),
            mindhw = min(dhw, na.rm = TRUE))

# Target combos + bounds
targets <- peak_dates %>%
  transmute(year = as.character(year), Week2) %>%   # match emmeans labels
  left_join(dhw_ranges, by = "year")

# Get emmeans grid # For plotting, Get emmeans for just the specific 2-week windows of interest in each year (corresp. to max. bleaching), And select just the range of peak DHWs experienced across sites in each year
dhw.res <- emmeans(dhw.mod24, specs = c("dhw", "year", "Week2"), type = "response",
                   re.form = NA,
                   at = list(dhw = seq(0, 20.4, 0.1), Week2 = unique(peak_dates$Week2)), 
                   rg.limit = 20000, level = 0.84)

# Filter for target year:Week2 and dhw ranges
dhw.res2 <- as_tibble(dhw.res) %>%
  inner_join(targets, by = c("year", "Week2")) %>%
  filter(dhw > mindhw, dhw <= maxdhw)

dhw.res3 <- as_tibble(dhw.res) %>%
  inner_join(targets, by = c("year", "Week2")) %>%
  filter(year == 2024, dhw > maxdhw, prob <= 0.5)


# Plot
dhw.bleach.plot <- ggplot(as.tibble(dhw.res2), aes(x = dhw, y = prob, group = year)) +
  # Add lines and conf intervals for each year
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = prob - SE, ymax = prob + SE), lwd = 0, alpha = 0.1) +            # WHY NOT SE?
  geom_line(aes(color = year)) +
  geom_line(data = dhw.res3, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.1) +
  # Add year text labels
  geom_text(data = dhw_ranges,
           aes(x = maxdhw, y = c(0.80, 0.62, 0.96, 0.28), label = year),
           hjust = c(0,0,1,0), nudge_y = c(0,0,0,0), nudge_x = c(0,0,0,-0.3), size = 3) +
  # Add line segments at ED50s
  geom_segment(data = slice(ed50conf, 1:4),
              aes(x = ed50, xend = ed50, y = 0.492, yend = -0.025), lty = c(1,1,1,2), lwd = 0.1) +
  geom_point(data = slice(ed50conf, 1:4), aes(y = 0.5, x = ed50), pch = 1, stroke = 0.2) +
  # Annotate increase in heat tolerance
  annotate("segment", x = ed50conf[[1,2]], xend = ed50conf[[2,2]], y = 0.03, lwd = 0.2,
          arrow = arrow(type = "closed", length = unit(2, "mm"))) +
  annotate("segment", x = ed50conf[[1,2]], xend = ed50conf[[3,2]], y = 0.01, lwd = 0.2,
          arrow = arrow(type = "closed", length = unit(2, "mm"))) +
  annotate("segment", x = ed50conf[[1,2]], xend = ed50conf[[4,2]], y = -0.01, lwd = 0.2, lty = 2,
          arrow = arrow(type = "open", length = unit(2, "mm"))) +
  annotate("segment", x = ed50conf[[4,2]] - 1e-6, xend = ed50conf[[4,2]], y = -0.01, yend = -0.01, lwd = 0.2, lty = 1,
           arrow = arrow(type = "open", length = unit(2, "mm"))) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1, 20.45), breaks = seq(0, 20, 4), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.025, 1), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)), breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1), 
                     labels = scales::label_percent()) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(x = "Degree Heating Weeks (DHW; °C-weeks)", y = "Bleaching prevalence") +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    geom_errorbar(
    data = ed50conf %>% dplyr::filter(year %in% c("2014","2015","2023","2024")),
    aes(x = ed50, xmin = lower, xmax = upper, y = 0.5, color = year),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, width = 0.025
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = ed50conf %>% dplyr::filter(year %in% c("2014","2015","2023","2024")),
    aes(x = ed50, y = 0.5, color = year),
    size = 1
  ) +
  geom_text(data = ed50conf %>% slice(2:4),
            aes(x = ed50, y = c(0.03, 0.01, -0.01), color = year,
                label = paste0(" + ", round(ed50 - 2.51, 1), " DHW")),
            hjust = 0, size = 3, fontface = "italic")

dhw.bleach.plot
```

## 2. Convert ∆ED50 --> ∆°C (across-year slope)

Spatially explicit, using pixel-weighted average slope of ∆DHW vs. ∆°C across all years
```{r change_degC_thresh}
# Load dhw vs degC slopes for each pixel
pixel_slopes <- read_csv("data/processed/pixel_slopes.csv")

# Pixel weights for all corals observed
pixel_weights_all <- read_csv("data/processed/pixel_weights_all.csv")

# Use pixel weighted average slope
# Join slopes to weights
pixel_dat <- pixel_weights_all %>%
  left_join(pixel_slopes, by = "pixel") %>%
  filter(!is.na(slope), !is.na(w_pixel_all))

# Ensure weights sum to 1 (safety)
pixel_dat <- pixel_dat %>%
  mutate(w_pixel_all = w_pixel_all / sum(w_pixel_all))

# Weighted mean slope
dhw.per.degC <- sum(pixel_dat$w_pixel_all * pixel_dat$slope)

# Propagated SE of weighted mean
dhw.per.degC.se <- sqrt(sum((pixel_dat$w_pixel_all^2) * (pixel_dat$se^2)))


# Convert change in ed50s (DHW) to change in tolerance (°C) 
## Propagate errors (quadrature method for relative error propagation)
degC <- ed50conf %>%
  filter(year %in% c("2024-2014", "2023-2014", "2015-2014")) %>%
  mutate(degC = ed50 / dhw.per.degC,
         degC.se = sqrt((se/ed50)^2 + (dhw.per.degC.se/dhw.per.degC)^2) * degC,
         degC.lower = degC - (1.96 * degC.se),
         degC.upper = degC + (1.96 * degC.se)) %>%
  separate(year, into = c("year", "2014"))

degC_year <- degC %>% 
  dplyr::select(year, degC) %>%
  tibble::add_row(year = "2014", degC = 0) %>%
  mutate(year = as.integer(year))

add_by_year <- degC_year %>%
  mutate(year = as.character(year)) %>%
  tibble::deframe()

add_by_year
#   2014   2015   2023   2024
#  0.000  0.513  0.980  1.600
```


## 3. Recalc adj. DHW at MMM + ∆°C
```{r}
# ============================================================
# 1) Helpers + constants
# ============================================================

file_date <- function(f) {
  as.Date(stringr::str_match(basename(f), "(\\d{8})")[,2], "%Y%m%d")
}

# Florida Reef Tract extent
fl_ext <- terra::ext(-83.525, -78.975, 23.975, 28.025)

years_keep   <- c(2014, 2015, 2023, 2024)
start_mmdd   <- "06-01"
end_mmdd     <- "12-31"
cushion_days <- 83L   # to allow full 84-day windows at June 1

sst_dir   <- "data/coraltemp"
clim_file <- "data/coraltemp/ct5km_climatology_v3.1.nc"

# ============================================================
# 2) Read native MMM once and confirm native grid matches SST
# ============================================================

mmm_full <- rast(clim_file, subds = "sst_clim_mmm")

sst_files_all <- list.files(
  sst_dir,
  pattern = "^coraltemp_v3\\.1_\\d{8}\\.nc$",
  full.names = TRUE
)
sst_dates_all <- file_date(sst_files_all)

sst1 <- rast(sst_files_all[1], subds = "analysed_sst")

# confirm native geometry matches
stopifnot(compareGeom(sst1, mmm_full, stopOnError = FALSE))

# crop both to the same extent, preserving native grid
mmm0 <- crop(mmm_full, fl_ext)
sst1_crop <- crop(sst1, fl_ext)

# confirm cropped geometry still matches
stopifnot(compareGeom(sst1_crop, mmm0, stopOnError = FALSE))

# ============================================================
# 4) Compute DHW directly on native SST grid
# ============================================================

compute_dhw_rasters <- function(sst_stack, mmm_raster,
                                start_date, end_date,
                                mmm_add = 0,
                                set_time_noon_utc = TRUE) {

  # sanity
  stopifnot(compareGeom(sst_stack[[1]], mmm_raster, stopOnError = FALSE))

  # MMM adjustment if desired
  mmm_shift <- mmm_raster + mmm_add

  # HotSpot = SST - MMM
  hotspot <- sst_stack - mmm_shift

  # retain only HotSpot >= 1; otherwise 0
  hotspot_ge1 <- ifel(hotspot >= 1, hotspot, 0)

  # convert to daily DHW contribution in degree-C-weeks
  dhd <- hotspot_ge1 / 7

  # rolling 84-day sum, including current day
  n <- nlyr(dhd)
  w <- 84L
  out <- vector("list", n)

  for (i in seq_len(n)) {
    j0 <- max(1L, i - w + 1L)
    out[[i]] <- app(dhd[[j0:i]], sum, na.rm = TRUE)
  }

  dhw_stack <- rast(out)

  # preserve source dates from SST stack
  sst_dates <- as.Date(time(sst_stack))

  keep <- sst_dates >= start_date & sst_dates <= end_date
  dhw_stack <- dhw_stack[[which(keep)]]
  keep_dates <- sst_dates[keep]

  if (set_time_noon_utc) {
    time(dhw_stack) <- as.POSIXct(paste(keep_dates, "12:00:00"), tz = "UTC")
  } else {
    time(dhw_stack) <- keep_dates
  }

  names(dhw_stack) <- paste0("dhw_", keep_dates)

  peak_dhw <- app(dhw_stack, max, na.rm = TRUE)
  names(peak_dhw) <- "peak_dhw"

  list(
    dhw_stack = dhw_stack,
    peak_dhw  = peak_dhw
  )
}

dhw_stacks_shifted <- list()
peak_dhw_shifted <- list()

for (yy in years_keep) {

  message("Recomputing shifted DHW for year: ", yy)

  start_date <- as.Date(sprintf("%d-%s", yy, start_mmdd))
  end_date   <- as.Date(sprintf("%d-%s", yy, end_mmdd))

  keep <- sst_dates_all >= (start_date - cushion_days) &
          sst_dates_all <= end_date

  sst_files <- sst_files_all[keep]
  sst_dates <- sst_dates_all[keep]

  if (length(sst_files) == 0) stop("No SST files found for year ", yy)

  sst_stack <- rast(sst_files, subds = "analysed_sst")
  sst_stack <- crop(sst_stack, fl_ext)
  time(sst_stack) <- as.POSIXct(paste(sst_dates, "12:00:00"), tz = "UTC")

  add_val <- add_by_year[[as.character(yy)]]
  if (is.null(add_val)) add_val <- 0

  res <- compute_dhw_rasters(
    sst_stack  = sst_stack,
    mmm_raster = mmm0,
    start_date = start_date,
    end_date   = end_date,
    mmm_add    = add_val
  )

  dhw_stacks_shifted[[as.character(yy)]] <- res$dhw_stack
  peak_dhw_shifted[[as.character(yy)]]   <- res$peak_dhw

  assign(paste0("dhw_stack_shifted_", yy), res$dhw_stack, envir = .GlobalEnv)
  assign(paste0("peak_dhw_shifted_", yy),  res$peak_dhw,  envir = .GlobalEnv)
}

# re-extract shifted dhw values for survey sites
dhw_stacks_shifted_named <- list(
  "2014" = dhw_stack_shifted_2014,
  "2015" = dhw_stack_shifted_2015,
  "2023" = dhw_stack_shifted_2023,
  "2024" = dhw_stack_shifted_2024
)

survey_dhw_shifted_list <- vector("list", length(years_keep))
names(survey_dhw_shifted_list) <- as.character(years_keep)
```

```{r}
# Get shifted DHWs for each site on date surveyed
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Read survey data once
# ------------------------------------------------------------
surveys_all <- read_csv("data/drm/FRRP_EXPORT.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    Date = as_date(as.character(Date), format = "%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Date),
         !is.na(Longitude),
         !is.na(Latitude)) %>%
  distinct(Site, Date, Latitude, Longitude, Subregion)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper: standardize raster CRS if terra reports "unknown"
# ------------------------------------------------------------
fix_lonlat_crs <- function(r) {
  r_crs <- terra::crs(r)
  if (is.na(r_crs) || r_crs == "" || grepl('GEOGCRS\\["unknown"', r_crs)) {
    terra::crs(r) <- "OGC:CRS84"
  }
  r
}

# great-circle distance in meters
haversine_m <- function(lon1, lat1, lon2, lat2) {
  rad <- pi / 180
  lon1 <- lon1 * rad
  lat1 <- lat1 * rad
  lon2 <- lon2 * rad
  lat2 <- lat2 * rad

  dlon <- lon2 - lon1
  dlat <- lat2 - lat1

  a <- sin(dlat / 2)^2 + cos(lat1) * cos(lat2) * sin(dlon / 2)^2
  2 * 6371000 * asin(pmin(1, sqrt(a)))
}

extract_layer_values_diag <- function(r_layer, df_xy, max_dist_m = 6000) {
  r_layer <- fix_lonlat_crs(r_layer)

  # first try: direct cell extraction
  simple <- terra::extract(
    r_layer,
    df_xy[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")],
    method = "simple",
    ID = FALSE
  )[, 1]

  vals <- terra::values(r_layer, mat = FALSE)
  good_cells <- which(!is.na(vals))

  good_xy <- terra::xyFromCell(r_layer, good_cells)
  good_vals <- vals[good_cells]

  final <- simple
  used_nearest <- rep(FALSE, length(simple))
  nearest_dist_m <- rep(NA_real_, length(simple))

  miss <- which(is.na(simple))

  for (i in miss) {
    d <- haversine_m(
      lon1 = df_xy$Longitude[i],
      lat1 = df_xy$Latitude[i],
      lon2 = good_xy[, 1],
      lat2 = good_xy[, 2]
    )

    j <- which.min(d)

    if (length(j) == 1 && is.finite(d[j])) {
      nearest_dist_m[i] <- d[j]

      if (d[j] <= max_dist_m) {
        final[i] <- as.numeric(good_vals[j])
        used_nearest[i] <- TRUE
      }
    }
  }

  tibble(
    value_simple = simple,
    value_final = final,
    used_nearest = used_nearest,
    nearest_dist_m = nearest_dist_m
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# For a survey table with one row per survey, extract raster values
# from the layer matching each survey date
#
# Required columns in surveys:
#   Date, Longitude, Latitude
#
# value_name is the output column name, e.g. "dhw_crw"
# ------------------------------------------------------------
extract_stack_on_survey_dates <- function(rstk, surveys, prefix = "dhw", max_dist_m = 6000) {
  rstk <- fix_lonlat_crs(rstk)

  layer_dates  <- as.Date(time(rstk))
  survey_dates <- as.Date(surveys$Date)

  lyr_idx <- match(survey_dates, layer_dates)

  out_simple <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(surveys))
  out_final  <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(surveys))
  out_used   <- rep(FALSE, nrow(surveys))
  out_dist   <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(surveys))

  idx_by_date <- split(seq_len(nrow(surveys)), survey_dates)

  for (dd in names(idx_by_date)) {
    rows <- idx_by_date[[dd]]
    k <- match(as.Date(dd), layer_dates)

    if (is.na(k)) next

    ex <- extract_layer_values_diag(
      r_layer = rstk[[k]],
      df_xy = surveys[rows, c("Longitude", "Latitude")],
      max_dist_m = max_dist_m
    )

    out_simple[rows] <- ex$value_simple
    out_final[rows]  <- ex$value_final
    out_used[rows]   <- ex$used_nearest
    out_dist[rows]   <- ex$nearest_dist_m
  }

  surveys[[paste0(prefix, "_simple")]] <- out_simple
  surveys[[prefix]] <- out_final
  surveys[[paste0(prefix, "_used_nearest")]] <- out_used
  surveys[[paste0(prefix, "_nearest_dist_m")]] <- out_dist
  surveys$layer_matched <- lyr_idx

  surveys
}

# Extract shifted DHWs for survey sites
for (yy in years_keep) {

  surveys_yy <- surveys_all %>%
    filter(year(Date) == yy)

  if (nrow(surveys_yy) == 0) next

  r_shift <- dhw_stacks_shifted_named[[as.character(yy)]]

  out_yy <- extract_stack_on_survey_dates(
    rstk = r_shift,
    surveys = surveys_yy,
    prefix = "dhw_shifted",
    max_dist_m = 6000
  ) %>%
    mutate(year = yy)

  survey_dhw_shifted_list[[as.character(yy)]] <- out_yy
}

survey_dhw_shifted <- bind_rows(survey_dhw_shifted_list) %>%
  mutate(year = as.character(year))

# average dhw per site (some sites were surveyed across multiple dates, e.g. T1 and T2 on one date others another)
survey_dhw_shifted <- survey_dhw_shifted %>%
  group_by(Site) %>%
  summarize(dhw_shifted = mean(dhw_shifted))


allg_shift <- allg %>% left_join(survey_dhw_shifted)
```


## 4. Validation model: Bleaching ~ adj. DHW
```{r}
# Set dhw to dhw_shifted
allg_shift <- allg_shift %>% mutate(dhw = dhw_shifted)
# Validation model
# Model differences in bleaching severity between years with DHW as continuous predictor
dhw.mod24.shift <- glmer(cbind(BL, NB) ~ dhw + year + year:Week2 + (dhw + year | Species) + (year | Subregion),  
                   family = "binomial", data = allg_shift, 
                   verbose = FALSE, nAGQ = 0, control = glmerControl(optimizer = "nloptwrap"))
summary(dhw.mod24.shift)



# Get point estimates for ED50s and ∆ED50s
bleach50.shift <- ed50s.fun_fast(dhw.mod24.shift)
bleach50.shift

# Get bootstrap confidence intervals for ED50s and ∆ED50s across years
set.seed(1)
boot.shift <- bootMer(dhw.mod24.shift, FUN = ed50s.fun_fast, nsim = 120, re.form = NULL,
                      seed = 123, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = 6)
saveRDS(boot.shift, file = "data/processed/boot.shift.rds")
boot.shift <- readRDS(file = "data/processed/boot.shift.rds")
## Get confidence intervals from Bootstrap
lower <- apply(boot.shift$t, 2, function(x) as.numeric(quantile(x, probs=.025, na.rm=TRUE)))
upper <- apply(boot.shift$t, 2, function(x) as.numeric(quantile(x, probs=.975, na.rm=TRUE)))
se <- apply(boot.shift$t, 2, sd)

ed50conf_shift <- tibble(
  year = names(bleach50.shift), 
  ed50 = bleach50.shift,
  se = se,
  lower = lower,
  upper = upper)
ed50conf_shift


# Get max and min DHW for conducted surveys as bounds
dhw_ranges_shift <- allg_shift %>% 
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(maxdhw = max(dhw),
            mindhw = min(dhw))

# Target combos + bounds
targets.shift <- peak_dates %>%
  transmute(year = as.character(year), Week2) %>%   # match emmeans labels
  left_join(dhw_ranges_shift, by = "year")

# Get emmeans grid # For plotting, Get emmeans for just the specific 2-week windows of interest in each year (corresp. to max. bleaching), And select just the range of peak DHWs experienced across sites in each year
dhw.shift.res <- emmeans(dhw.mod24.shift, specs = c("dhw", "year", "Week2"), type = "response",
                   re.form = NA,
                   at = list(dhw = seq(0, 12, 0.1), Week2 = unique(peak_dates$Week2)), 
                   rg.limit = 20000, level = 0.84)

# Filter for target year:Week2 and dhw ranges
dhw.shift.res2 <- as_tibble(dhw.shift.res) %>%
  inner_join(targets.shift, by = c("year", "Week2")) %>%
  filter(dhw >= mindhw, dhw <= maxdhw)

# Plot
dhw.shift.bleach.plot <- ggplot(as.tibble(dhw.shift.res2), aes(x = dhw, y = prob, group = year)) +
  # Add lines and conf intervals for each year
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = prob - SE, ymax = prob + SE), lwd = 0, alpha = 0.1) +            # WHY NOT SE?
  geom_line(aes(color = year)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1, 20.4), breaks = seq(0, 20, 4), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.025, 1), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)), breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1),
                     labels = scales::label_percent()) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Recomputed DHW with shifted thresholds\n(°C-weeks; across-year ∆°C per ∆DHW)", y = "Bleaching prevalence") +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = ed50conf_shift %>% dplyr::filter(year %in% c("2014","2015","2023")),
    aes(x = ed50, xmin = lower, xmax = upper, y = 0.5, color = year),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, width = 0.025
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = ed50conf_shift %>% dplyr::filter(year %in% c("2014","2015","2023")),
    aes(x = ed50, y = 0.5, color = year),
    size = 1
  )
  # -------------------



# years are not perfectly corrected for
ed50conf_shift
# because 2014-2023 shifts -1.86 (overcorrected by global shift using across-years slope)
```


## 5. Convert ∆ED50 --> ∆°C (year-specific slopes)
```{r}
# Get year-specific slopes of ∆DHW vs. ∆°C

# Import pixel-weighted year-specific ∆DHW vs. ∆°C slopes
w_slope_year_res_diffs <- read_csv("data/processed/w_year_slope_offsets.csv")

w_slope_year_res_diffs <- w_slope_year_res_diffs %>%
  mutate(slopetouse = dhw.per.degC + diff2014)

degC.year.shift <- ed50conf %>%
  filter(year %in% c("2024-2014", "2023-2014", "2015-2014")) %>%
  separate(year, into = c("year", "ref")) %>%
  left_join(w_slope_year_res_diffs %>% mutate(year = as.character(year))) %>%
  mutate(dhw.per.degC.year = dhw.per.degC + diff2014) %>%
  mutate(degC = ed50 / dhw.per.degC.year)
  

degC_year_shift <- degC.year.shift %>% 
  dplyr::select(year, degC) %>%
  tibble::add_row(year = "2014", degC = 0) %>%
  mutate(year = as.integer(year))

add_by_year2 <- degC_year_shift %>%
  mutate(year = as.character(year)) %>%
  tibble::deframe()
```

## 6. Recalc year-adj. DHW at MMM + ∆°C (year-specific)
```{r}
# Recompute 2015 and 2023 DHWs at year-specific calculated shifted thresholds
dhw_stacks_shifted2 <- list()
peak_dhw_shifted2 <- list()

for (yy in years_keep) {

  message("Recomputing shifted DHW for year: ", yy)

  start_date <- as.Date(sprintf("%d-%s", yy, start_mmdd))
  end_date   <- as.Date(sprintf("%d-%s", yy, end_mmdd))

  keep <- sst_dates_all >= (start_date - cushion_days) &
          sst_dates_all <= end_date

  sst_files <- sst_files_all[keep]
  sst_dates <- sst_dates_all[keep]

  if (length(sst_files) == 0) stop("No SST files found for year ", yy)

  sst_stack <- rast(sst_files, subds = "analysed_sst")
  sst_stack <- crop(sst_stack, fl_ext)
  time(sst_stack) <- as.POSIXct(paste(sst_dates, "12:00:00"), tz = "UTC")

  add_val <- add_by_year2[[as.character(yy)]]
  if (is.null(add_val)) add_val <- 0

  res <- compute_dhw_rasters(
    sst_stack  = sst_stack,
    mmm_raster = mmm0,
    start_date = start_date,
    end_date   = end_date,
    mmm_add    = add_val
  )

  dhw_stacks_shifted2[[as.character(yy)]] <- res$dhw_stack
  peak_dhw_shifted2[[as.character(yy)]]   <- res$peak_dhw

  assign(paste0("dhw_stack_shifted2_", yy), res$dhw_stack, envir = .GlobalEnv)
  assign(paste0("peak_dhw_shifted2_", yy),  res$peak_dhw,  envir = .GlobalEnv)
}

# re-extract shifted dhw values for survey sites
dhw_stacks_shifted2_named <- list(
  "2014" = dhw_stack_shifted2_2014,
  "2015" = dhw_stack_shifted2_2015,
  "2023" = dhw_stack_shifted2_2023,
  "2024" = dhw_stack_shifted2_2024
)

survey_dhw_shifted2_list <- vector("list", length(years_keep))
names(survey_dhw_shifted2_list) <- as.character(years_keep)


# Extract shifted DHWs for survey sites
for (yy in years_keep) {

  surveys_yy <- surveys_all %>%
    filter(year(Date) == yy)

  if (nrow(surveys_yy) == 0) next

  r_shift <- dhw_stacks_shifted2_named[[as.character(yy)]]

  out_yy <- extract_stack_on_survey_dates(
    rstk = r_shift,
    surveys = surveys_yy,
    prefix = "dhw_shifted",
    max_dist_m = 6000
  ) %>%
    mutate(year = yy)

  survey_dhw_shifted2_list[[as.character(yy)]] <- out_yy
}

survey_dhw_shifted2 <- bind_rows(survey_dhw_shifted2_list) %>%
  mutate(year = as.character(year))

# average dhw per site (some sites were surveyed across multiple dates, e.g. T1 and T2 on one date others another)
survey_dhw_shifted2 <- survey_dhw_shifted2 %>%
  group_by(Site) %>%
  summarize(dhw_shifted = mean(dhw_shifted))


allg_shift2 <- allg %>% left_join(survey_dhw_shifted2)
```


## 7. Validation model #2: Bleaching ~ year-adj. DHW
```{r}
allg_shift2 <- allg_shift2 %>% mutate(dhw = dhw_shifted)
# Validation model
# Model differences in bleaching severity between years with DHW as continuous predictor
dhw.mod24.shift2 <- glmer(cbind(BL, NB) ~ dhw + year + year:Week2 + (dhw + year | Species) + (year | Subregion),  
                   family = "binomial", data = allg_shift2, 
                   verbose = FALSE, nAGQ = 0, control = glmerControl(optimizer = "nloptwrap"))
summary(dhw.mod24.shift2)



# Get point estimates for ED50s and ∆ED50s
bleach50.shift2 <- ed50s.fun_fast(dhw.mod24.shift2)
bleach50.shift2

# Get bootstrap confidence intervals for ED50s and ∆ED50s across years
set.seed(1)
boot.shift2 <- bootMer(dhw.mod24.shift2, FUN = ed50s.fun_fast, nsim = 120, re.form = NULL,
                    seed = 123, parallel = "multicore", ncpus = 6)
saveRDS(boot.shift2, file = "data/processed/boot.shift2.rds")
boot.shift2 <- readRDS(file = "data/processed/boot.shift2.rds")
## Get confidence intervals from Bootstrap
lower <- apply(boot.shift2$t, 2, function(x) as.numeric(quantile(x, probs=.025, na.rm=TRUE)))
upper <- apply(boot.shift2$t, 2, function(x) as.numeric(quantile(x, probs=.975, na.rm=TRUE)))
se <- apply(boot.shift2$t, 2, sd)

ed50conf_shift2 <- tibble(
  year = names(bleach50.shift2), 
  ed50 = bleach50.shift2,
  se = se,
  lower = lower,
  upper = upper)
ed50conf_shift2


# Get max and min DHW for conducted surveys as bounds
dhw_ranges_shift2 <- allg_shift2 %>% 
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(maxdhw = max(dhw),
            mindhw = min(dhw))

# Target combos + bounds
targets.shift2 <- peak_dates %>%
  transmute(year = as.character(year), Week2) %>%   # match emmeans labels
  left_join(dhw_ranges_shift2, by = "year")

# Get emmeans grid # For plotting, Get emmeans for just the specific 2-week windows of interest in each year (corresp. to max. bleaching), And select just the range of peak DHWs experienced across sites in each year
dhw.shift2.res <- emmeans(dhw.mod24.shift2, specs = c("dhw", "year", "Week2"), type = "response",
                   re.form = NA,
                   at = list(dhw = seq(0, 12, 0.1), Week2 = unique(peak_dates$Week2)), 
                   rg.limit = 20000, level = 0.84)

# Filter for target year:Week2 and dhw ranges
dhw.shift2.res2 <- as_tibble(dhw.shift2.res) %>%
  inner_join(targets.shift2, by = c("year", "Week2")) %>%
  filter(dhw >= mindhw, dhw <= maxdhw)


# Plot
dhw.shift2.bleach.plot <- ggplot(as.tibble(dhw.shift2.res2), aes(x = dhw, y = prob, group = year)) +
  # Add lines and conf intervals for each year
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = prob - SE, ymax = prob + SE), lwd = 0, alpha = 0.1) +            # WHY NOT SE?
  geom_line(aes(color = year)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1, 20.4), breaks = seq(0, 20, 4), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.025, 1), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)), breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1),
                     labels = scales::label_percent()) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Recomputed DHW with shifted thresholds\n(°C-weeks; year-specific ∆°C per ∆DHW)", 
       y = "Bleaching prevalence") +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = ed50conf_shift2 %>% dplyr::filter(year %in% c("2014","2015","2023")),
    aes(x = ed50, xmin = lower, xmax = upper, y = 0.5, color = year),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, width = 0.025
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = ed50conf_shift2 %>% dplyr::filter(year %in% c("2014","2015","2023")),
    aes(x = ed50, y = 0.5, color = year),
    size = 1
  )
  # -------------------



# NO SIG DIFF BETWEEN YEARS ONCE YEAR-SPECIFIC SHIFTS APPLIED (INSTEAD OF GLOBAL DEGC/DHW)
ed50conf_shift2
```

## 8. Plot figure
```{r}

cowplot::plot_grid(
  dhw.bleach.plot,
  dhw.shift.bleach.plot + theme(legend.position = "none"),
  dhw.shift2.bleach.plot + theme(legend.position = "none"),
  nrow = 1, align = "hv"
)

```
